name: Remind Prisma Regenerate on Schema Change
description: When prisma/schema.prisma is edited, remind the agent to regenerate the Prisma client.

then.prompt: prisma/schema.prisma was just edited. Run `npm run prisma:generate` in the backend directory to regenerate the Prisma client at generated/prisma/. Do this before running the app or writing any code that imports from the Prisma client.
